author: leon
name: SP8192 + CaseOps + Gated Attention + Quant Gate + Loop4-5 + Phased TTT + Frozen Recurrent Alpha
blurb: Frozen cross-layer recurrent alpha/beta scalars on the #1736 stack. After training with learnable depth-recurrence blends (RECUR_ALPHA_ENABLED=1, NUM_LOOPS=2, loop layers 3-5), the converged alpha/beta values are frozen as constants. BPB scored on original pre-transform UTF-8 bytes via per-token byte sidecar (CaseOps).
reproducibility_notes: Run prepare_caseops_data.py once to tokenize FineWeb via CaseOps. Then run train_gpt.py per seed with RECUR_ALPHA_ENABLED=1 NUM_LOOPS=2 as documented in README.md.
